title: Viral Image Pack
description: The sharpest image prompts in the product: premium ad shots, high-CTR thumbnails, and cinematic portraits.
why_it_matters: Fastest path to scroll-stopping visuals and most shareable outputs.

title: Operator Pack
description: Practical prompts for emails, broken workflows, and clean communication under pressure.
why_it_matters: Turns rough work problems into clearer messages and stronger systems.

title: Thinking Pack
description: Higher-signal prompts for research and structured reasoning when output quality matters.
why_it_matters: Improves trust and usefulness by separating facts, uncertainty, and recommendations.
